title: Validators, Incremental Crawls, Checkpoints, Resume, and Deletion
description: Every run downloads everything, a 304 loses prior content, checkpoints duplicate rows after crash, and disappeared pages remain reported as current. Learners cumulatively produce incremental crawl and recovery ledger through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Store ETag and Last-Modified with representation identity and issue correct conditional requests without treating validators as content hashes.
On 304, reconnect current response metadata to a compatible retained representation and reject missing or mismatched cache state.
Checkpoint frontier, visited states, response identity, output transaction, schema, and revision atomically or through a replayable log.
